paths.name: ./store-lifecycle.js
paths.message: Import from explicit submodules (./store-lifecycle/*) to avoid barrel coupling.

paths.name: ../store-lifecycle.js
paths.message: Import from explicit submodules (../store-lifecycle/*) to avoid barrel coupling.

paths.name: ./store.js
paths.message: Import from explicit leaf modules (./store-write.js, ./store-read.js, ./store-notify.js) to avoid barrel coupling.

paths.name: ../store.js
paths.message: Import from explicit leaf modules (../store-write.js, ../store-read.js, ../store-notify.js) to avoid barrel coupling.

paths.name: ./store-write.js
paths.message: store-notify must not import store-write; use hooks/callbacks instead.

paths.name: ../store-write.js
paths.message: store-notify must not import store-write; use hooks/callbacks instead.

paths.name: ./store-lifecycle/registry.js
paths.message: async-cache must not depend on store-lifecycle; use store-core instead.

paths.name: ../store-lifecycle/registry.js
paths.message: async-cache must not depend on store-lifecycle; use store-core instead.

paths.name: ./store-notify.js
paths.message: async-cache must not depend on store-notify; use store-core or public API.

paths.name: ../store-notify.js
paths.message: async-cache must not depend on store-notify; use store-core or public API.
